---
title: "CoLab score: TAE-based tolerance ranges for impact of bias on confusion matrices based on simulations_discordance in ED population with low COVID-19 prevalence"
output: html_document
date: "Report generated on: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
set.seed(seed = 200)
```

## Load libraries.
```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(DT)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
```

## Set main parameters.
```{r}
parameters <- new.env()
parameters$original_data <- read.csv('data/colab_ed_low_prevalence.csv')
parameters$discordance_data <-
  read.csv('out/colab/simulations_discordance/colab_discordance_ed_low_tol_tae_bias_per_individual.csv')
parameters$identifier <- "Pat"
parameters$model_outcome <- "outcome"
parameters$model_outcome_class_TRUE <-  "1"
```

## Set bootstrap parameters for results of individual laboratories.
```{r}
parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples <- NA
parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level <- NA
parameters$bootstrap_methods <- NA # choose from c("perc¨, "norm", "bca")
```

## Set plot parameters.
```{r}
parameters$histogram_auroc_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_accuracy_binwidth <- 0.02
parameters$histogram_sensitivity_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_specificity_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_ppv_binwidth <- 0.02
parameters$histogram_npv_binwidth <- 0.02
```

## Set parameters to save results.
```{r}
parameters$model_name <- 'colab'
parameters$population <- 'ed_low_tol_tae'
parameters$path_output <- 'out/colab/simulations_confusion_matrix/'
```

```{r, child='markdown/template_confusion_matrices.Rmd'}

```
